prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: The Widow in Cabin 9
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Lifetime Original
Tagline: Where every secret comes home.
Theme: Silence is just fear wearing cashmere.
Omen: a child drawing stairs
Relationship dynamic: unresolved hometown romance
Props: casserole dish, unopened letter, ceramic owl

Cast:
- Elias Bennett | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=magazine editor | threat_aura=0.39 | space=side room with a space heater and old family records | secrets=once left town without explaining why

- Elias Mercer | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=real estate agent | threat_aura=0.62 | space=old storm shelter from before the divorce | secrets=may die first or survive unbelievably; knows about a half sibling no one asked for
- Elias Cross | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=realtor | threat_aura=0.8 | space=old family office described as paperwork I have not gone through yet | secrets=knows why the old orchard chapel was closed; had brunch with someone officially deceased
- Jenna Dane | archetype=soft_spoken_menace | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=artisan developer | threat_aura=0.74 | space=meditation annex nobody uses in winter | secrets=has a second phone labeled as a work precaution; keeps duplicate keys for reasons framed as kindness
- Luke Pruitt | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=innkeeper | threat_aura=0.5 | space=annex room described as paperwork I have not gone through yet | secrets=saw the wrong person near the lake once and never shut up about it
- Derek Mercer | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Evelyn Hawthorne | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Noah Bennett is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Elias Bennett says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Alder Ridge.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Noah?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Derek. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Elias. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The casserole dish is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Elias."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
